sentences.text: To log in uh uh manage users, manage properties at the end of the day, my hope is to help save you time uh and data collection and be able to uh leverage the data with an apartment like you to make really actionable uh decisions uh for your business.
So with me, I'm joined with uh the wonderful Phil, gonna go ahead and let him introduce himself.
Hey, everybody.
Uh for those who don't know, I'm the customer success manager that's been working closely with Michelle uh to get the apartment IQ platform spun up and rolled out to everybody at Willow Bridge.
Looking forward to continuing to support you guys after this training period and beyond.
Uh So I'm here as a resource, but I'll hand it back to Jamie to lead our training this afternoon.
Thanks, Phil.
Uh just as a few housekeeping measures um During today's call.
If you have any questions, feel free to leverage the chat tool at the bottom of your screen additionally, please try to interrupt me and ask some questions as we're going here.

Um Always willing to stop and pause and dive a little deeper into uh the data as well, but before we dive into what we're seeing within apartment IQ would love to just give a really quick summary as to what exactly is Apartment IQ if this is the first time you're seeing it.
Um So apartment IQ at a very small glance is a data analytic tool that's going to streamline and centralize all of your market, survey data and comp data.
It's fully automated and it completely eliminates the need for you to do any kind of like manual data entry, secret shopping for pricing all of that.
Um To help you understand how frequently it updates, we update the system every 24 hours and you'll find that number at the top of each of the pages here within the department IQ.
Um Additionally, all of the data that we're tracking is 100% public data pulled directly from the online leasing portion of property websites.
So we're tracking down those high level property comparisons.
And then we're also gonna drill down into unit by unit comparisons as we dive through the platform today.
So just a couple other uh housekeeping things in terms of navigating the system when you log into apartment IQ.
For those of you who are what we refer to as admin users, you will see all of the various market surveys within here.
But rest assured we can customize who can see which market surveys uh by leveraging some of our user permissions.
So just wanted to show you where you could see um your manage user section here.
As I mentioned, we have two different types of user types.
We have our admin users which have the ability to add and remove other users.
And admin users also have the ability to manage any data within your system.
So if you ever need to swap up, swap out comps, make adjustments uh for your site teams, you have the ability to do that and we'll dive a little deeper into that in just a few minutes.
Um Additionally, we also have our read only users.
So users who have access to their um prescribed data sets but cannot actually make any adjustments to users or properties.
Now that we've talked about that, let's dive into the star of our show, the market surveys.
So here when you log in, you're going to see all of the various market surveys since we are located in the Midwest.
Uh I was looking through some of your market surveys.
I noticed that this one in particular is located in the Midwest.
So wanted to dive into this Minnesota uh property today.

So when you click into a particular market survey, um what we have done with partnering with Michelle is we have compiled a list of subject properties and various comps that we think would be really well suited here.

So you'll see your subject property, the vey highlighted in indigo along with all of the comps that were provided to us again, you have 100% control of this data if for some reason and there are comps in here that need to be adjusted.
All you need to do is go up here to the manage properties section
and you have the ability to remove simply by clicking the X or add properties here.
Now, apartment IQ is built off of um properties that we've already built into the system.
So if I type in uh a specific address and I find it within the system, I can click it and simply click add to comp set and it will take about 24 hours for that data to refresh.
Now, if the property isn't in there, let's say it's a brand new property or something that we haven't tracked before you have the ability to request it.
So if you click this button, it will send it to our data integrity and support team.
